# VitaK Tracker

> Vitamin K tracking for warfarin patients. Free, open-source PWA.

## What is VitaK Tracker?

VitaK Tracker is a Progressive Web App that helps warfarin (Coumadin) patients manage their vitamin K intake through a credit-based system. Users track daily, weekly, and monthly vitamin K consumption against personalized limits to maintain stable INR levels.

## Key Features

- **Credit System**: Each food contributes vitamin K "credits" toward daily/weekly/monthly limits
- **89 Foods Database**: 38 USDA FoodData Central verified, 51 estimates
- **Per-100g Values**: All values standardized to mcg per 100g
- **Visual Charts**: Daily intake history, category breakdowns, progress indicators
- **Meal Presets**: Save frequent meals for quick logging
- **PWA**: Works offline, installable on mobile/desktop
- **Free**: No subscription, no ads, no paywall on core features

## Data Sources

Vitamin K values are sourced from USDA FoodData Central SR Legacy data (nutrient ID 1185, phylloquinone). Prepared food entries are market estimates, not USDA-sourced. Each food in the database includes a `data_source` field (`usda_fdc_sr_legacy` or `estimate`).

## Public APIs (x402 Paid)

VitaK offers paid APIs via HTTP 402 protocol (x402) for programmatic access to vitamin K data:

### Discovery Endpoints

- `GET /.well-known/api-catalog` — RFC 9727 API catalog (linkset+json)
- `GET /.well-known/agent-skills` — Agent skills discovery index
- `GET /.well-known/mcp/server-card.json` — MCP server card (SEP-1649)
- `GET /.well-known/oauth-protected-resource` — OAuth 2.0 protected resource metadata (RFC 9728)
- `GET /.well-known/openapi.json` — OpenAPI 3.1 specification
- `GET /.well-known/x402` — x402 payment discovery (wallet, pricing, endpoints)
- `GET /.well-known/ai-plugin.json` — ChatGPT plugin manifest
- `GET /api-docs` — Human-readable API documentation
- Homepage `Link` headers advertise all discovery endpoints per RFC 8288
- `Accept: text/markdown` content negotiation returns markdown for homepage and `/api-docs`

### 1. Food Search API
```
GET /api/x402/food/search?query=spinach&category=vegetables&limit=20
Cost: $0.001 per request
```

### 2. Food Detail API
```
GET /api/x402/food/{id}
Cost: $0.001 per request
```

### 3. Vitamin K Calculator API
```
POST /api/x402/calculate
Body: { "food_id": "abc123", "portion_size_g": 180 }
Cost: $0.002 per request
```

### 4. Batch Food Data API
```
GET /api/x402/food/export?format=json&category=vegetables
Cost: $0.05 per request
```

Payment is handled via x402 protocol (HTTP 402) using USDC on Base network.
Wallet: `0xc406fFf2Ce8b5dce517d03cd3531960eb2F6110d`

## Architecture

- **Frontend**: Next.js 15, React 19, Tailwind CSS, Shadcn UI
- **Backend**: tRPC for type-safe APIs, Clerk for auth
- **Database**: Cloudflare D1 (SQLite)
- **Hosting**: Cloudflare Workers
- **Domain**: vitaktracker.com

## Data Accuracy

All vitamin K values are per 100g (mcg). Critical data corrections were made on 2026-04-14 after verifying against USDA FoodData Central API:

| Food | Previous (wrong) | Corrected (USDA) | Issue |
|------|-----------------|-------------------|-------|
| Spinach (raw) | 145 | 483 | Was per-cup, not per-100g |
| Kale (raw) | 113 | 390 | Severely understated |
| Kale (cooked) | 817 | 418 | 2x overstated |
| Swiss chard (cooked) | 830 | 327 | Was raw value, not cooked |
| Collard greens (cooked) | 770 | 407 | Was per-cup value |

## Contact

- Website: https://vitaktracker.com
- GitHub: (open source)
- X/Twitter: @vitaktracker

## Safety Notice

This tool is for informational purposes only. Warfarin dosing is medically sensitive — always consult your healthcare provider before making dietary changes. Vitamin K values are based on USDA data but individual food items may vary. The app rounds UP vitamin K calculations (ceil) to be conservative for patient safety.
